Emma’s significant strategic communications experience benefits clients across the public and private sphere, including the food, energy, financial and healthcare sectors.

ie Mobile +353 86 258 7206 Tel +353 1 660 7395 LinkedIn Connect Emma Flannery Senior Account Director Emma Flannery Senior Account Director Emma joined Heneghan in 2011 and was appointed to the board of directors in June 2023, recognising her contribution to the business. Emma provides strategic communications consultancy services across our client portfolio and works closely with senior management teams to develop high-impact national and local campaigns across multiple media channels.

A former Chairman of the Irish Public Relations Consultants Association (PRCA), Nigel gained early career experience working in London and Dubai. Nigel is a government-appointed member of Rethink Ireland, which supports innovative non-profit organisations nationwide. Previously, he was also a ministerial appointee to the Compliance Committee of the Broadcasting Authority of Ireland. Nigel holds a diploma in Corporate Governance from the Corporate Governance Institute. Email nigel@heneghan.

Widely recognised as an expert in strategic communications, he is a trusted advisor to leading national and international organisations and provides counsel to individuals in senior corporate and leadership roles. Nigel particularly specialises in communications strategy, corporate and financial communications, and crisis management. Supported by Heneghan’s dynamic team, he brings an enviable network of contacts in business, media, government and the wider community to his client engagements.

## Contact Us
Contact us Our People Our Services Our Clients News & Insights Contact Us Send an email Name Email Address Telephone Query We value your privacy.

Our targeted approach helps clients to define their online audiences, develop tailored content, engage those audiences through the appropriate channels, and monitor the outcomes. Heneghan’s digital services can be delivered as a standalone offering or alongside other strategic communications services. Social media support can be tailored per client. Heneghan also designs and delivers social media workshops for organisations of all sizes.

Based in Dublin, we work with clients across Ireland and overseas. Heneghan is the Irish affiliate of BCW, a global top three public relations agency, enabling international outreach for our clients and provide communications support to global businesses in Ireland. Digital and Social At Heneghan, we offer a full-circle digital and social media service, from the development of content calendars and SEO strategies to content creation, paid digital activity, and analytics and feedback.

Our areas of expertise include media relations, corporate and financial PR, crisis and reputation management, public affairs and advocacy, digital strategy and implementation, media training and internal communications. We invest time and attention in fully understanding our clients and their objectives, in order to deliver truly impactful communications campaigns. With a track record of exceptional results, Heneghan has a reputation for professionalism, originality and unrivalled client service.
